---
id: create-settlement-entry
title: "Create a settlement journal entry"
description: "Creates a settlement entry (CASH debit / SETTLEMENT_PAYABLE credit) for the specified deal. The entry starts in DRAFT status."
sidebar_label: "Create a settlement journal entry"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a settlement journal entry"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/journals/settlement"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a settlement entry (CASH debit / SETTLEMENT_PAYABLE credit) for the specified deal. The entry starts in DRAFT status.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
